creator: aeuii@posteo.de
text:
# freebsd-version
11.0-RELEASE-p3

# pkg info | grep qTox
qTox-1.5.2


I'm unable to hear anything in qTox and get the flowing warnings.  Other audio programs work without any problems on the system.

[15:26:33.420 UTC] src/audio/audio.cpp:386 : Debug: Opening audio output "pcm0:play:dsp0"
